title: Backend Developer Vacancy at Microsoft India - 2026 Batch

jsonLd.title: Backend Developer Vacancy at Microsoft India - 2026 Batch
jsonLd.description:
Are you a skilled Backend Developer looking for your next big career move? Microsoft India in Vadodara offers you the perfect platform to grow professionally and personally.

About Microsoft India:
Microsoft India is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Design, develop and maintain scalable software applications
• Deploy and manage applications on cloud platforms like AWS, Azure, or GCP
• Optimize application performance and ensure high availability
• Ensure code security and follow best practices for data protection
• Mentor junior developers and conduct knowledge-sharing sessions
• Contribute to system architecture and technical design decisions
• Integrate third-party APIs and services

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Master's degree preferred
• 3-6 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in REST APIs
• Proficiency in Docker
• Proficiency in AWS
• Proficiency in Rust
• Proficiency in Git
• Proficiency in Node.js
• Proficiency in Java
• Proficiency in Agile/Scrum

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• International travel opportunities for senior roles
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Referral bonus program
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• Company-sponsored certifications
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Salary Range: 7 LPA - 15 LPA per annum

Location: Vadodara, Gujarat, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Microsoft India!
